name: Gossiper Shopify Admin MCP Server
what_it_does: Ultra-slim Shopify Admin MCP server from Gossiper. Provides a focused, lightweight integration for controlling Shopify Admin tasks via AI agents or chat prompts — emphasizing minimal setup and simplicity over comprehensive feature coverage.
use_cases: Managing Shopify store tasks from a simple, low-overhead AI integration
Performing targeted Shopify Admin operations from merchant AI assistants
Lightweight Shopify automation for teams wanting minimal integration complexity
Quick Shopify store management for small merchants via AI prompts
not_for: Enterprise Shopify operations requiring comprehensive Admin API coverage
High-volume automated Shopify workflows needing full API access
Shopify Plus features requiring partner-level API access
best_when: A small to medium Shopify merchant wants a simple AI interface for managing their store — prioritizing ease of setup over comprehensive functionality.
avoid_when: You need the full Shopify Admin API. The ultra-slim focus means reduced feature coverage. For comprehensive Shopify automation, use the official Shopify MCP.

auth.notes: Shopify Admin API credentials required. Gossiper acts as integration layer. Shopify custom app with appropriate scopes needed.

pricing.notes: Gossiper service pricing not publicly documented. Shopify subscription required.

performance.rate_limits: Shopify Admin API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Ultra-slim means limited API coverage — verify required operations are supported
Shopify PII: customer and order data is sensitive — GDPR/CCPA compliance required
Gossiper intermediary: store data passes through Gossiper's systems
Feature gaps vs official Shopify MCP — test critical operations before production deployment
Small team/emerging service — support and maintenance may be limited
agent_readiness.security_notes: Shopify store data including customer PII passes through Gossiper. PCI-DSS applies for payment data. GDPR/CCPA for customer data. Verify data handling policies.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer PII and order data. Gossiper intermediary processes store data. PCI-DSS scope. GDPR compliance for EU customers. Third-party data handling.
